fishobspgr 0.0.0.9001
  • Reference
  • Changelog

    BC Fish Observation collections

    fop_collections_observation.Rd

    Get information about the BC Fish Observation collections.

    fop_collections_observation()

    Value

    A tibble.

    See also

    Other collections: fop_collection_observation_properties(), fop_collection_passage_properties(), fop_collections_passage(), fop_query_collection_observation(), fop_query_collection_passage()

    Examples

    library(sf)
fop_collections_observation()
#> Error in get_request(url = url, user = user, verbose = verbose): API request failed [502]: <html>

#> <head><title>502 Bad Gateway</title></head>

#> <body>

#> <center><h1>502 Bad Gateway</h1></center>

#> <hr><center>nginx/1.18.0 (Ubuntu)</center>

#> </body>

#> </html>

#> .
